title: cyperus delavayi
intro: Cyperus delavayi is a type of sedge plant, specifically a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Cyperus delavayi include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In traditional herbal preparations, Cyperus delavayi is often used as a decoction or infusion, either on its own or in combination with other herbs, to create remedies for various health conditions.
